name: Ofensiva de Sirte de 2016

wikipedia.date:
Date 12 May – 6 December 2016
(6 months, 3 weeks and 3 days)
wikipedia.result:
GNA victory
The GNA capture Abu Qurayn , Bin Jawad , Nofaliya , Harawa , Ghardabiya Air Base and Sirte power station, completely besieging the city
The GNA take control of Sirte in December 2016

participants.side: Government of National Accord, Libyan Army, Misrata Brigades y aliados

outcome:
GNA victory
The GNA capture Abu Qurayn , Bin Jawad , Nofaliya , Harawa , Ghardabiya Air Base and Sirte power station, completely besieging the city
The GNA take control of Sirte in December 2016
consequences: Impacto militar y politico localizado en Asia central; requiere ampliacion historiografica fina.

chronology.text:

campaign: Campana vinculada a Guerra de Afganistan
treaties: Cierre o arreglo posterior pendiente de curaduria especifica (2016)
curationNote: Metadatos estructurales agregados por tanda segura; bajas y tratados especificos quedan como no consolidados si no habia fuente fina.
